goal: Splice the motor driver and geared motors from a dead RC toy into a small robot drive base with a salvaged ESP32 controller

repair_intake.device_hint: RC toy car dual H-bridge motor controller
symptoms: motors do not spin when throttle applied
board worked until crash then went silent
repair_intake.when_it_fails: immediately on battery connect — no motor movement at all
repro_steps: Press throttle on original transmitter — no response
repair_intake.operator_notes: Motor harnesses look intact; main MCU section cracked

available_parts.name: dead RC toy car donor board
available_parts.notes: Dual H-bridge section and motor harnesses still intact

available_parts.name: ESP32 dev board from parts bin

vision_source.device_hint: RC toy dual H-bridge donor PCB

evidence_notes: splice:keep motor harness intact on J_MOTOR_L and J_MOTOR_R
splice:measure VMOTOR before connecting ESP32 logic
